---
title: "groove_analysis"
author: "Janek Z"
format: dashboard
theme: quartz
editor: visual
---

# Welcome

### Introduction

::: {.card title="Introduction"}
In this analysis I analyze a playlist I created called "I Don't Want This Groove to Ever End", named after the first track on it.
:::

### The Playlist

::: {.card title="The Playlist"}
The playlist is a collection of what I call groovy songs: tracks that are heavily based on a looped or recurring musical phrase or rhythmic pattern.
:::

# The Analysis

### Overview

::: {.card title="Overview"}
Here the analysis of the playlist will be shown.
:::

### Example Code

::: {.card title="Example Code"}
```{r}
1 + 1
```
:::
